N = No outpatient services immediately prior to admission 

COMMENT: CMS monitors the frequency of beneficiaries being treated as hospital outpatients (e.g., being treated in 
observation units, which is paid under Medicare Part B). CMS adopted the Two-Midnight rule for 
admissions beginning on or after October 1, 2013. This rule established Medicare payment policy 
regarding the benchmark criteria that should be used when determining whether inpatient admission is
